chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 269 - وَقَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنِ اِطَّلَى وَ اِخْتَضَبَ بِالْحِنَّاءِ آمَنَهُ اَللَّهُ تَعَالَى مِنْ ثَلاَثِ خِصَالٍ اَلْجُذَامِ وَ اَلْبَرَصِ وَ اَلْآكِلَةِ إِلَى طَلْيَةٍ مِثْلِهَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.269 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever applies depilatory substances (to remove body hair) and dyes with henna, Allah (swt), the Most High, protects him from three things: leprosy, vitiligo (a skin disorder), and ‘al-ākilah’ (a type of skin disease or severe wound infection) until the next time he applies it."
